title: Ben Reynolds (athlete)
extract: Ben Reynolds (born 26 September 1990) is an Irish athlete specialising in the sprint hurdles. He represented his country at the 2015 World Championships in Beijing without advancing from the first round. His personal bests are 13.48 seconds in the 110 metres hurdles (+0.8 m/s, Bedford 2015) and 7.73 seconds in the 60 metres hurdles (Athlone 2016).
